title: List report filters do not show defect category value help
description: Tester cannot quickly filter bugs by defect category in the Fiori list report.
stepsToReproduce: Open the bug list report and inspect the filter bar
actualResult: Defect category is not easy to discover from the current filter bar
expectedResult: Defect category should be available as a clear filter

title: Developer assignment remains pending for workflow category
description: No developer is automatically selected when the bug is classified under assignment workflow.
stepsToReproduce: Create a bug with IDTS Assignment and Workflow category
actualResult: Status stays pending because no assignment candidate has been selected
expectedResult: The system should route the bug to a matching developer or unassigned queue

title: CAP status transition validation is not enforced yet
description: A developer can update status values without the planned WP3 transition validation.
stepsToReproduce: Update a bug status directly through the service
actualResult: Invalid transitions can still be accepted before WP3 handlers are implemented
expectedResult: Only allowed transitions should be accepted and logged

title: Rejected bug needs clear next processor follow-up
description: A rejected bug can be misunderstood as final if the next processor is not visible to the tester.
stepsToReproduce: Open a rejected bug and inspect assignment information
actualResult: User may not know who must correct the classification
expectedResult: Rejected bugs should show reason and next processor clearly
rejectionReason: Classification does not match the developer responsibility area
